rationale: The proposed change concerns Tax Code §11.13(b) homestead exemption amounts. Educ. Code §37.125 governs firearms offenses on school property. The two provisions share no operative overlap.
quote: Sec. 37.125. EXHIBITION, USE, OR THREAT OF EXHIBITION OR USE OF FIREARMS.
_note: No relationship between the proposed homestead exemption increase and this firearms-in-schools criminal statute.
